message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl

Beads issue tracker JSONL update reflecting issues that were closed
or had comments appended during this session. JSONL is the
local-first source of truth for the beads issue store and is synced
to git per project convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
